ChangeRequest.name: `International organisation code` is used in multiple entity types (i.e., `European Central Bank` and `International organisation`) but there exists no reference data entity type
ChangeRequest.comment:
<!-- See: documentation on [Issues in GitLab](https://gitlab.sofa.dev/sdd-bird-team/bird-logical-data-model/-/wikis/Issues-in-GitLab) -->
### Overview
`International organisation code` is used in multiple entity types (i.e., `European Central Bank` and `International organisation`) but there exists no reference data entity type
### Contact person
dominik.lin-ully@oenb.at
### Description of change request
Please add a reference data entity type covering international organisation codes; add the reference to the entity types `European Central Bank` and `International organisation`.
### Summary of impacted LDM objects/attributes
* entity types `European Central Bank` and `International organisation` will have a field resulting from a relationship instead of an attribute
### Forward Engineering considerations _[Other considerations]_
### Before closing checklist - [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Any other actions to be taken
